title: More Xp More Size
description: Each new level of experience increases the player's size. Now the player is the tallest mob!
body:
## Description
Each new level of experience increases the player's size. Now the player is the tallest mob!

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XYZbGkqL/images/80f36a964ad9e2dd69003a441ef94066d95fa7f8.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
